findings.title: Playwright workflow path coverage gap
findings.notes: Nested lib change coverage for frontend QA workflow.

findings.title: Bookkeeping source-of-truth overlap between v1 and v2
findings.notes: Closeout and tracked-state drift between workpack docs, PR evidence, and .workflow-v2.

findings.title: OMO v2 is not yet default promotion-ready
findings.notes: Promotion blocker covering pilot/manual-handoff/live-smoke/scheduler standardization risk.

findings.title: Audit sample coverage omits recent or in-flight OMO evidence
findings.notes: Audit default sample or audit context ignores recent merged slices, in-flight slices, or incident-linked lanes.

findings.title: Runtime anomaly signals are missing from OMO audit findings
findings.notes: Stale lock, blocked retry, skip_locked dead-end, or stage_running residue are present but not surfaced as findings.

findings.title: Canonical OMO evidence depends on ephemeral or missing artifacts
findings.notes: Promotion or audit evidence points at tmp/off-repo paths or missing bundles instead of retained repo-local artifacts.

findings.title: PR or CI reality drift is not reflected in audit outputs
findings.notes: Current head check state, PR body projection drift, or no-op rerun recovery need exists but audit output does not surface it.

findings.title: Promotion verdict ignores unresolved incident or replay gaps
findings.notes: Auditor can return candidate or ready even when open incident families or missing replay evidence remain.
